
everytime you make a change or install an app , update changelog.md with a short description of the change and the date. This will help you keep track of your progress and make it easier to write release notes later on. 

you should mention the files modified and the reason for the change. if a package or application is installed, mention the name and version of the package. 

add date and time to the log entry.

write code and documentation in English. use short and concise sentences. a couple of sentences are enough to describe the change.
